calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-05-2015 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Mar-20-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Stephen Hwang (executor) in Propria Persona.

Mr. Hwang stated that he had made a mistake on the petition, that it included his father's investment accounts that were transfer on death accounts. The court requested Mr. Hwang file a declaration explaining everything that transpired and took the status on filing the inventory and appraisal under submission pending requested filing.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-10-2014 Granted Per Written Order
